name: Zuccanoes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cooked soybeans or brown rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice zucchini (or summer squash) in half lengthwise.
2. Scoop out the insides, leaving a 1/4 inch rim so the canoe stays intact.
3. Sauté the chopped zucchini innards, mushrooms, onion, garlic, sunflower seeds, and season with rosemary, basil, and thyme in butter until heated through.
4. Beat the 3 eggs.
5. Mix the beaten eggs with 1 1/2 cups cottage cheese, wheat germ, tamari, tabasco, grated cheese, soybeans or brown rice. Stir well to combine.
6. Stuff each zucchini canoe generously with the egg mixture.
7. Sprinkle with paprika.
8. Bake at 450°F for 40 minutes.
9. Serve topped with extra grated cheese or sour cream.
